---
name: Question
about: General questions, help requests, or troubleshooting that are not security
  disclosures.
title: "[QUESTION]"
labels: question
assignees: ''

---

Please use this template for usage questions, debugging help, or seeking guidance. For bugs, use the Bug report template. For security issues, follow SECURITY.md.

## Summary
Brief description of your question or what you need help with.

## Environment
- demi version / commit SHA:
- OS & architecture:
- Toolchain / build commands used:

## What you tried
Describe steps you've already taken (commands, config, searches) and their results.

## Reproducer or example
If applicable, provide a minimal example (code snippet or link) we can run to see the issue or behavior.

## Desired outcome
What would success look like? What are you hoping to achieve?

## Additional details
Any logs, error messages, or relevant configuration (sanitized).
